name: vscode-web-file-system
description: Registers a VS Code file system that is answered by the page the workbench is embedded in.

webFileSystem.channel.markdownDescription: Name of the `BroadcastChannel` the page answers file system questions on. It needs setting only when one origin embeds several workbenches and each wants its own; when empty, both halves meet on `vscode-web-file-system`.
